category_sources: Official GitHub README describes gdrive as a command-line application for interacting with Google Drive.
source_facts.description identifies it as a Google Drive CLI client.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README title use gdrive.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository includes README usage and a docs directory referenced by the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/glotlabs/gdrive, so repo is not redetermined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README states it is a command-line application for interacting with Google Drive.
source_facts.description says Google Drive CLI Client.
